body_txt: A trope in which the gravity functions in any way other than "what goes up must come down". More common in modern games than in earlier ones, but there were some in the days of the NES . Usually, the change of gravity is local to the player, but sometimes not. Almost always counts as an Interface Screw . More often than not a puzzle level. Common types include: In video games, especially platformers, frequently a form of Gimmick Level . Compare Floor Fakeout .
